children.text: to supersede the limitations or exceptions on the use of rocket engines for national security purposes under section 1608 of the Carl Levin and Howard P. “Buck” McKeon National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2015 (; ; note), as amended by section 1607 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2016 (; ) and section 1602 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2017 (; ); orPublic Law 113–291128 Stat. 362610 U.S.C. 2271Public Law 114–92129 Stat. 1100Public Law 114–328130 Stat. 2582
to prohibit a contractor or subcontractor of the Department of Defense from acquiring components referred to in such section 1608.
